item.title: Citi, JPMorgan downgrade Mattel after earnings miss and disappointing guidance
item.description: Shares of Mattel plunged 28% in Wednesday's premarket trading session.

item.title: Baird upgrades Dick’s Sporting Goods on Foot Locker recovery and growing market share
item.description: Baird sees shares of Dick's Sporting Goods rising 27% from here.

item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Worries over how artificial intelligence may disrupt financial services weighed on the S&P 500, pulling the broad market index down on Tuesday.

item.title: The AI threat wrecked software stocks. Now financial stocks look next with LPL closing 8% lower
item.description: Financial services firms tanked after the launch of a new AI-powered tax planning tool that promises to do the work "within minutes."

item.title: Vatican Bank makes first foray into equity indexes, setting stage for potential ETF launches
item.description: The Holy See-linked bank debuted two indexes tracking 50 stocks that it said align with Catholic teachings, marking a push into retail investment prod...
